sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40614" key="e)pipota/mios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιποτάμ-ιος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n40614.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">on a river</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πόλις</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0539.tlg001:54J" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hellanic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">54J.</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> </sense> </entryFree>
